Sr. Principal AI Systems Engineer - Northrop Grumman

Job Title: Sr. Principal AI Systems Engineer
Company: Northrop Grumman
Location: Falls Church, VA (Remote/Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description

Northrop Grumman seeks a senior-level AI Systems Engineer for the Insights & Intelligence (i2) organization. The role focuses on data ingestion, AI infrastructure, and AI model deployment at scale ensuring AI solutions are both economical and trustworthy.

The position reports to the Manager of AI Infrastructure Engineering and involves collaboration with DevOps engineers, data scientists, and product teams to shape AI system roadmaps.

Key Responsibilities

- Architect end-to-end pipelines for data ingestion, model training, validation, and serving
- Develop self-service APIs and CLI tools for internal teams managing vectorization and index resources
- Build internal SDKs, libraries, and tools simplifying model deployment and lifecycle management
- Research emerging embedding models and vector-search technologies
- Evaluate cloud providers, on-premises hardware, and managed AI services through cost-benefit analysis
- Implement AI use cases with compliance and security controls
- Stay current on AI hardware and software frameworks

Required Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems, or related field
- 8 years relevant experience (Bachelor's) OR 6 years (Master's) OR 4 years (PhD)
- Minimum 3 years in AI/MLOps
- 2+ years with AWS or Azure cloud infrastructure
- Programming expertise: Python, Java, Powershell/Bash
- Experience with AI/ML frameworks, SQL/NoSQL databases, and distributed computing
- Knowledge of cybersecurity for AI systems
- Ability to match hardware configurations to AI requirements
- Strong communication skills for technical and non-technical audiences

Preferred Qualifications

- Cloud-native AI services experience (SageMaker, EKS, ML, AKS)
- Load testing and infrastructure scaling expertise
- Hands-on AI systems implementation
- DevOps practices and CI/CD automation
- AWS Associate Level Certificate or higher
- Azure Associate Level Certificate or higher
- Active DoD Secret Clearance

Additional Details

- Relocation Assistance: None available
- Clearance Required: No
- Travel: Yes, 10% of the time
- Salary Range: $156,400 - $234,600 annually
- U.S. Citizenship Required: Yes for government clearance positions
